note: 算法根据公开行情自动生成的候选,经 Claude 盘前按新闻/信心筛选。仅供学习/研究参考,不构成投资建议或收益承诺。市场有风险,盈亏自负。
data_quality_flags: Energy gapped +9~12% today on the oil surge (OXY +9%, CVX/XOM +10%, USO +12%); the algo's same-day chase filter knocked all energy names out, leaving only AMD as a candidate.
conviction_note: 1 name by conviction. Energy is the one strong, independently-supported theme today (Iran escalation), and I'm already holding OXY profitably. AMD has a real catalyst (Advancing AI conf today) but is already +8.7%/3d into it — chasing into a known event risks sell-the-news; no-chase guard blocks it too. Tech/semis otherwise mixed (QQQ/NVDA/TSLA down). Not padding to more names.

reasoning.en: HOLD energy. Iran escalation intact: 11th consecutive day of US strikes, Brent ~$95, ceasefire hopes faded, Hormuz shipping still disrupted (Rubio: US will keep protecting shipping). Already long OXY from $55.79 (+1.3%), 3d +5.3% (under no-chase). Managed by armed trailing stop; note energy is very extended today (+9%), so a pullback likely trail-locks the gain — that's fine.
reasoning.zh: 继续持有能源。伊朗升级不变:美国连续第 11 天空袭、Brent ~$95、停火希望消退、霍尔木兹航运仍受阻(Rubio 称美国将继续护航)。已在 $55.79 持有 OXY(+1.3%),3 日 +5.3%(未过热)。由已武装的移动止盈管理;今天能源很超买(+9%),回调大概率会锁利离场,可以接受。
